# signoz_service_account (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "signoz_service_account" "example" {
  id = "0192a9c2-1234-7abc-8def-0123456789ab"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `email` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String)
- `org_id` (String)
